channel.title: Session Zero
channel.description: High-friction truths and systems architecture from Session Zero.
channel.itunes:author: James Hood

item.title: Episode 1: Escape the SaaS Rent Trap
item.description:
Welcome to The Sovereign Pilot. In this episode, we execute a transformative breakdown of the per-seat SaaS pricing model and dismantle the SaaS rent trap efficiency trap. We explore how Baur Software's Tenure plan replaces expensive third-party tools with sovereign, open-source infrastructure.
## The Feral Telemetry (Timestamps)
* **[00:00]** - Initialization: The SaaS Rent Trap and the absurdity of the per-seat software pricing model. * **[05:15]** - Deconstructing the Beige World Logic: The $997/month Tenure Starter Plan replacing standard corporate suites. * **[10:30]** - The Feral Stack: Transitioning to self-hosted open-source tools like DocuSeal, Vaultwarden, and Cal.com. * **[15:45]** - Securing the Perimeter: Deploying Caddy reverse proxies and the Principal Agent Protocol (PAP) for zero-trust access. * **[18:20]** - The Dev Loop: Replacing third-party repositories with GitLab CE and automating the CI/CD pipeline. * **[21:00]** - System Audit and Motor Exit Points: Shifting from software renters to digital real estate landlords.
### Lexicon Markers Triggered
* **The Toll Booth Model:** The traditional SaaS paradigm where vendors control compute and pricing, taxing business growth by charging per user, per month. * **Tenure:** A managed infrastructure service by Baur Software that deploys enterprise-grade, open-source equivalents to popular business tools directly onto a client's private server. * **Principal Agent Protocol (PAP):** A zero-trust security layer that cryptographically verifies agent identity and intent, ensuring AI agents and users only access exactly what they are mandated to see.
### Out-of-Band Verification (Resources)
* [The Sovereign Pilot Substack](https://jameshood118.substack.com) * [Baur Software](https://baursoftware.com)
--- *End of Transmission.*
